note: Archetype traversal route on surface1 (Phase B, FID-0031/D4). Bond walks forward, strafes right, then turns (GE007_AUTO_FORWARD/RIGHT/CRIGHT baked into the captured OSContPad stream) with the level intro skipped (replay_env) so the movement window exercises the level geometry/collision sim. Deterministic under the determinism envelope + replay_env: record==replay1==replay2 (sim_state_hash byte-exact, verified across independent recordings). The ares-free determinism half of the surface1 gate:true route; the ares trace comparison is the manual oracle step (movement_oracle_capture.sh --route surface1_traverse). Regenerate only via scratchpad/finalize_archetype_tapes.sh. Gated by tools/fidelity/gate_routes_smoke.sh + tools/fidelity/tape_regression.sh. Re-baselined 2026-07-11 (84f1ce11dfdc143b->c7851db53af0fa3b) for FID-0014: the faithful WAYMODE_MAGIC patrol semantics (default ON) freeze unseen patrolling/gopos guards and pad-warp them per retail chrTickBeams US 0x7F020EF0 / chrlvTravelTickMagic US 0x7F028600, so offscreen patroller positions (sim state) differ from the legacy creep-walk. GE007_NO_PATROL_MAGIC_FIX=1 reproduces the previous hash 84f1ce11dfdc143b byte-identically (verified on this tape). See docs/fidelity/derivations/FID-0014-patrol-magic.md. Re-baselined 2026-07-12 (c7851db53af0fa3b->5be9e9ab95c3694b) for FID-0046: the effect-buffer zero-init (default ON, initexplosioncasing.c) zeroes g_ExplosionBuffer free-slot dead words (parts[].pos/size/rot, read only when frame>0) that this level's file-load left non-zero in the hashed pool region. Gameplay is byte-identical -- the words are dead memory the game never reads; screenshots are identical fix-ON vs fix-OFF. GE007_NO_EFFECT_BUF_ZERO_INIT=1 reproduces the prior hash c7851db53af0fa3b byte-identically (opt-out A/B verified across 3 runs). See docs/fidelity/ledger/FID-0046.json.
